name: Germany (naval ensign)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic gold of the federal eagle's beak and claws

description: Swallow-tailed black-red-gold tricolour with the federal eagle shield (Bundesschild) at the centre.
history: Adopted on 25 May 1956 as the war flag and naval ensign of the Bundeswehr; designed deliberately distinct from the Imperial and Nazi-era German naval ensigns.

features.symbolism: the German national tricolour, in swallow-tail form
marks the ship as belonging to the Bundeswehr (German Federal Navy)
